description: Auto-detected panel geometry for LTG motion spec sheets. Generated by LTG_TOOL_sheet_geometry_calibrate.py. Re-run after regenerating any motion sheet.

luma._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(80,120,200) from LTG_TOOL_luma_motion.py — blue family, not cyan
luma._annotation_bg_note: ANNOTATION_BG=(248,244,236) warm cream from LTG_TOOL_luma_motion.py; tol=12 excludes face-fill (250,240,220) which differs by 16 in B channel

byte._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(0,190,215) from LTG_TOOL_byte_motion.py — cyan family (ELEC_CYAN adjacent)

cosmo._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(80,120,200) from LTG_TOOL_cosmo_motion.py — blue family, matches Luma convention
cosmo._annotation_bg_note: ANNOTATION_BG=(248,244,238) warm cream from LTG_TOOL_cosmo_motion.py; tol=12 excludes light character fills (skin, cardigan highlights) that diverge more than 12 in any channel
